item.title: Halloween memes and ideas for the spooky season!
item.dc:creator: bobthefunny

item.title: After 4 months of unemployment and hundreds of applications, my nightmare is finally ending!
item.description: So excited to be starting a new job. No more unemployment. No more having to pick between bills and food. The stress is ending. I was supposed to get a call yesterday, but all I received was silence. I thought I had been ghosted yet again, but this morning I received the call that I had been waiting for, for a long time!
item.dc:creator: Matty3D

item.title: Images of Note: Black Metal
item.description:
oh my
owo
THIS
HELL YEAH
ngl this year sucks
Percy has done...unspeakable things.
SOUND ON
TempleOS is open source, we can fork it and make LainOS
RIP to the Cathars, y'all didn't deserve to die.
Roombas will kill given half the chance.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: My bottom shelf brain is melting 180/744 hours
item.description:
Get ready to read about the biggest announcement so far in Bottom Shelf Community history.
About a month ago, THE Imgur reached out to me and asked if we'd be interested in partnering up with them again this year to help raise money for Extra-Life.
Last year was the most fun I think I have ever had ever. BIG yes.
So, they offered THE BOTTOM SHELF COMMUNITY the opportunity to HOST their Extra-Life 2024 24-hour stream on November 2nd.
The meeting was me brainstorming with the mod team on different incentives and milestones throughout that big stream Extra-Life finale.
AND Y'ALL THEY (MEDIALABS/IMGUR) STRAIGHT UP APPROVED Frothy and I to STREAM OUR ICE BATH LIVE ON THEIR STREAM IF WE REACH OUR $9,000 MILESTONE BEFORE NOVEMBER.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Can't forget to tag @TinyOctopus here
This year, I impulsively decided to dedicate the literal entire month of October to panhandling for Extra-Life live on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka ...for 744 hours non stop. We are currently 180 hours in (day 8)
AND Y'ALL MEDIALABS/IMGUR STRAIGHT UP APPROVED Frothy and I to STREAM OUR ICE BATH LIVE ON THEIR STREAM IF WE REACH OUR $9,000 MILESTONE BEFORE NOVEMBER. [Yes, I know I already said this, but it is important that you know.] Even if you have zero interest in discord or twitch, you can still be a part of of the magic by donating to https://Extra-Life.org/participant/bottomshelfvodka
My husband @FrothyStout has been taking over the night shift while I stream during the day. We even implemented a shit ton of buttons within twitch that you can use to torment us for your own personal entertainment.
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax. Looking for more memes? Check out discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka BUT ALSO We are still reaching out to any artists who would like to participate in the auction. For those who are interested, the deadline to post is October 19th on discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Keep in mind that Imgur's Secret Santa is right around the corner! You can knock out three birds with one stone by supporting our Imgur community artists, Children's Hospital, AND finding the perfect gift for your future match. Imgur, by far, has the absolute most wholesome community when compared to any other shit-posting platforms. This time last year, you all donated $12,458 to the kids. Because of you, children can get the medical attention that they NEED, not just the medical attention their parents can afford.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Things seen this week during structural assessments!
item.description:
Cracks larger than 1/4th of an inch are a sign of serious concern. In cases like this, all damaged sections of the foundation would need to be replaced to restore the structural integrity and prevent further issues.
This wall has a severe lean of 8 inches.
This is primarily due to the lack of rebar reinforcement and non-filled block cells, which significantly weakens its ability to support the hillside.
A so-called “Foundation Specialist” misled an elderly couple by “retrofitting” a substandard and non-conforming retrofit that is meant for concrete foundations, having them spend thousands on this project by falsely claiming it was up to code and acceptable for their home. Well, as you can see here, this is a severely distressed brick foundation, which can’t be retrofitted and is classified as a structural weakness under the California Existing Building Code.
Poor drainage and the wedge of fill that built up this lot caused this slope failure because the accumulated water increased the soil’s weight and reduced its stability, ultimately leading to a loss of support and a dangerous shift in the slope.
This leaning wall presents a serious safety hazard, especially considering its height and the visible cracking already evident. The combination of these issues raises significant concerns about the wall's structural integrity and stability. Immediate attention is crucial to prevent potential collapse.
A solid foundation is essential for supporting your home, ensuring stability and long-term structural integrity. In this case, the posts, piers, and beam are not properly installed, leaving this section of the home without the adequate support.
Honestly, we’ve seen worse foundations. Thank you for joining us, we hope you enjoyed! Check out our Instagram for more exciting content, and we'll see you next Tuesday at 2 pm! https://www.instagram.com/alphastructural/
item.dc:creator: AlphaStructural

item.title: Reading social media comments about the hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: vodray

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1157 (sith sweatpants)
item.description:
It's another morning. Let's get this bread.
I actually referenced this meme in conversation the other day.
I wish they made the one piece formal star trek gowns from season 1. This is also the idea behind why I have started wearing long robes on my days off from work.
This goes hard. It's beautiful. It's holy.
Especially since it's getting to be too late to eat the rich to save humanity from the impending climate crisis. Oh, who am I kidding. It's already happening.
Cockatoos are hilarious, goofy assholes, I could totally imagine them doing this to a Marsupial lion.
Not a meme, but speaking of the impending climate crisis and, oh, the worst mass Extinction in the history of earth...
The collapse of the Assyrian Empire. Sorry, @sisipherr for making you think about Ninevah again.
Me, to my gaming group last night because I couldn't get sound to work on Discord because SOMEONE chewed through the cord to my headset just after we signed on. Looking at you, Pippin.
Maybe there is. Maybe there isn't. Science is intended to disprove, not prove, that's the bloody point. But I digress.
Everyone allows Bob Ross to bless them. That's just being a proper human.
Wait, you mean I always have to care for myself, and nobody will ever care for me again? Fuck.
This is a big mood, especially since it's still about 14 degrees above average right now.
Post-breakup Dooku in sweatpants, what will he binge-watch?
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Hey Pippin. Pippin. Morning." [Kiss noises followed by squeak toy noises]
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Healthy relationships look like this. Find a partner who cares about you.
item.description: Don't unmute. Music meh. I am lucky enough to have a partner who always makes sure to make my birthday feel special even though she knows I hate my birthday. I also am the only partner she has ever had that surprised her on her birthday. Actually, almost all of them for the 10+ years we have been together. She is my one true love and I would be devestated if we ever broke up. This isn't us in the video, but it's something she would certainly do.
item.dc:creator: PepperoniAndFingernailPizza

item.title: I’m not saying Floridians are dumb but…
item.dc:creator: DontCallMeMisterMark

item.title: I'M POSTING CHEESE TO DROWN OUT THE ANGER!
item.description:
Fucken cheese!
More fucken cheese!
Look at this fucken cheese!
Are you looking at this cheese?!
This cheese is fucking great!
Cheeeese!
The king cheese!!!
Cheese in bread is still cheese!
Still fucking cheese!
You better be expecting more cheese!!!
Cheese!
Holey cheese batman!
Use cheese stick!
Stick good!
Cheese!!!
Cheese 2024!
Cheese forever!
Cheese hidden in pockets!
Who put this here!
It was ME!!!!
With the cheese!
It not even in a wrapper
Just random charcuterie
In your fucking pocket!
Ahhhhhhhhhhhh!!!!!
Cheeeeeeese!!!!!
Look behind you!
More fucking cheese!
You can't escape the CHEESE!!!!!
This cheese message has been brought to you by my latest mental breakdown. Thank you and have a wonderful day. Cheese.
item.dc:creator: Illpostcheese

item.title: A Dutch supermarket introduced slow checkouts for lonely elderly people who want someone to talk to. The move has proven so successful that they have installed the checkouts in 200 stores. They have also added a ‘chat corner’ where locals could talk too
item.description: A Dutch supermarket introduced slow checkouts for lonely elderly people who want someone to talk to. The move has proven so successful that they have installed the checkouts in 200 stores. They have also added a ‘chat corner’ where locals could meet for a cup of coffee and a chat. Credit - original owner
item.dc:creator: Joyika
